title: Integrate and close Milestone M0
summary: Integrate the M0 foundations, run the complete gate on one commit, document residual risk, and make the repository ready for first gameplay simulation work.
acceptance: Web shell, desktop shell and headless simulation use one protocol source
Full CI gate passes from a clean clone
M0 ADRs, benchmark baseline and known limitations are current
No placeholder is represented as completed gameplay

history.details: Prepared M0 closeout: added root build:web gate, documented M0 placeholder boundaries and known limitations, ran the full M0 closeout gate, and recorded evidence in coordination/reports/WM-0011.md.

verified: No blocking findings; WM-0011 acceptance and M0 closeout evidence verified. Root build:web is a required-check alias to the existing web build, M0 placeholders are clearly documented as non-gameplay, and reproduced gates passed.

review.summary: No blocking findings; WM-0011 acceptance and M0 closeout evidence verified. Root build:web is a required-check alias to the existing web build, M0 placeholders are clearly documented as non-gameplay, and reproduced gates passed.
